title: Leak — stop using
summary: A dishwasher leak is a safety scenario.
warnings: Do not open the appliance with water and power present.

title: Leak — safety procedure
summary: Secure area and prepare details for service.
steps: Take photos of leak and panel.
warnings: The app does not guide electrical repairs.
dontDo: do not touch wet powered parts

title: Burning smell — disconnect and service
summary: Burning smell means stop and call service.
warnings: This is not a normal washing issue.

title: Burning smell — safety checklist
summary: Stop use and describe symptoms.
steps: Disconnect only if safe and dry.
warnings: Electrical risk requires service.

title: Electric risk — stop
summary: Do not diagnose dishwasher yourself when shock risk exists.
steps: Do not touch wet powered areas.
warnings: The app does not guide electrical repairs.

title: Electric risk — procedure
summary: Protect yourself and do not open appliance.
steps: Do not touch with wet hands.
warnings: This is safety, not standard cleaning.
dontDo: do not work near wet power

title: Not cleaning — first step
summary: Check filter, spray arms and loading.
warnings: Do not put hands inside during operation.

title: Not cleaning — full checklist
summary: Safe order for weak washing diagnosis.
steps: Rotate spray arms by hand when off.
Load dishes so water reaches dirt.
warnings: Do not disassemble pump or electrical modules.

title: Residue — check salt and rinse aid
summary: White residue often relates to water hardness or dosing.
warnings: Do not mix harsh chemicals.

title: Residue — full checklist
summary: Fix residue through water settings and maintenance.
steps: If residue returns, check water and service.
warnings: Use only dishwasher-safe products.
dontDo: do not pour salt into wash chamber

title: Bad smell — filter and seals
summary: Smell often comes from filter, food residue or wet seals.
steps: Leave door slightly open after cycle.
warnings: Burning smell means stop and service.
dontDo: do not mask smell only with freshener

title: Bad smell — full checklist
summary: Clean common odor sources.
steps: If smell is burning, stop and call service.
warnings: Do not mix cleaners.

title: Tablet not dissolving
summary: Often caused by blocked dispenser, short program or weak water flow.
warnings: Do not place tablet loosely unless manual allows.

title: Tablet — full checklist
summary: Fix undissolved tablet problem.
steps: Check if tablets are damp or old.
warnings: Do not disassemble dispenser while powered.

title: Wet dishes — first step
summary: Check rinse aid, drying program and unloading method.
steps: Open door after cycle if manual allows.
warnings: Plastic dries worse than glass and ceramic.
dontDo: do not judge drying only by plastic

title: Wet dishes — full checklist
summary: Improve drying through rinse aid, program and loading.
steps: Place cups so water does not pool.
If drying suddenly worsened, check manual/service.
warnings: Different dishes dry differently.
dontDo: do not close wet dishwasher for long

title: Not draining — safe first step
summary: Start with filter and visible blockage, not pump repair.
warnings: Do not disassemble pump or electrical parts.
dontDo: do not put hands deep into drain
do not tilt appliance without knowledge

title: Not draining — checklist
summary: Safe order without electrical repair.
steps: Do not disassemble pump or wires.
Call service if water or error remains.
warnings: Sharp debris may be in filter.

title: Error code — check manual
summary: Compare code with manual for exact model.
steps: Do not reset repeatedly without cause.
warnings: MVP does not know every manufacturer code.
dontDo: do not ignore code after leak or burning smell

title: Error code — full procedure
summary: Collect details before service or safe diagnosis.
steps: Write full code and when it appeared.
Stop use if code concerns water, leak or power.
warnings: Not every error is safe for DIY diagnosis.
dontDo: do not erase code before saving

title: Basic dishwasher checklist
summary: Start with filter, loading, program and detergent.
warnings: Leak, burning smell or shock risk means stop.

title: Universal dishwasher checklist
summary: Safe order for common problems.
steps: First exclude leak, burning smell and electric risk.
Check salt, rinse aid and detergent.
Call service for returning error or water.
warnings: The app does not guide electrical repairs or disassembly.
dontDo: do not test with burning smell
